title_zh: Skill 控制边界检查清单

items.check_en: Defines allowed tools, forbidden tools, allowed paths, and network boundaries.

items.check_zh: 高风险、不可逆、付费、凭证、生产写入动作需要人工确认条件。
items.check_en: Human gate conditions exist for high-risk, irreversible, paid, credential, or production-write actions.

items.check_zh: 关键输出存在 schema、格式或文件路径契约。
items.check_en: Critical outputs have schema, format, or file-path contracts.

items.check_zh: 权限不足、输入缺失、工具失败时默认停止或降级，不绕过边界。
items.check_en: Missing permissions, missing inputs, or tool failures fail closed or degrade without bypassing boundaries.

items.check_zh: 脚本、依赖、模板来源可追溯并可版本化。
items.check_en: Scripts, dependencies, and templates have provenance and versioning.
